vaccines.name: Rabies
vaccines.description: Required for all dogs in Hong Kong. First vaccination at 3 months, booster within 30 days, then every 3 years.

vaccines.name: DHPP/DAPP
vaccines.description: Distemper, Hepatitis, Parainfluenza, Parvovirus. Core vaccine for dogs.

vaccines.name: Bordetella
vaccines.description: Kennel cough. Required for dogs in boarding facilities.

vaccines.name: Leptospirosis
vaccines.description: Leptospira bacteria vaccine. Recommended for dogs in Hong Kong.

vaccines.name: Canine Influenza
vaccines.description: Dog flu vaccine. Recommended for social dogs.

vaccines.name: Rabies
vaccines.description: Required for cats in Hong Kong. First vaccination at 3 months.

vaccines.name: FVRCP
vaccines.description: Feline Viral Rhinotracheitis, Calicivirus, Panleukopenia. Core vaccine for cats.

vaccines.name: FeLV
vaccines.description: Feline Leukemia Virus. Recommended for outdoor cats.
